overall_verdict: HARDENED. All five front-matter fields confirmed. Both PSI hashes freshly verified — both match compile manifests exactly. Both staged packages independently confirmed ACTIVATION_READY by validator re-run. Production naming resolved: pkg_kb52c IS the ferritin production series; staged IDs are the correct production IDs — no renaming required. KEY CONSTRAINT FOR CURSOR: pkg_s24 retirement must use in-place manifest-level deprecation only (add deprecated: true + deprecated_by: [...] to package_manifest.yaml). Do NOT move or delete the pkg_s24_ferritin_high_overload directory. Do NOT modify signal_library.yaml within that package. Non-regression tests at test_signal_evaluator.py:1892 and test_investigation_narrative_contract.py:73 load this directory and assert len(signals)==1 — directory move or signal entry removal both break out-of-scope tests. Collision regression test requires no update. No runtime hardcoded blocking references found. No new signal IDs. No Intelligence Core interaction. Ready for kernel start.
